name: Herbed Corn on the Cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Into a large pot of boiling water, cook corn for 5 minutes until tender.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients.
3. In a microwave-safe dish, melt the butter on high for 1 - 1 1/2 minutes.
4. Serve the corn brushed with herb butter.
- PER SERVING: 129cal., 3g Pro., 7g Fat, 17g Carbo., 72mg Sodium
